svg.title: Nursing Inventory System — Item Type Aware Flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing two paths: consumable items auto-close on approval, non-consumable items show availability and go through return and penalty tracking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the item selection UI look like for borrowers?')
sendPrompt('What does the availability panel show for equipment?')
g.text: Who has it + return date shown

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are in the loan request form?')
sendPrompt('How is the PIN verified without a login session?')
sendPrompt('What does a pending loan look like on the admin side?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin approval screen show?')
sendPrompt('How does a consumable loan auto-complete?')
sendPrompt('What happens to consumable stock on approval?')
sendPrompt('How is a specific unit assigned to a borrower?')
g.text: Status: ACTIVE · visible to all users

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the daily overdue cron job work in NestJS?')
g.text: week_end vs today for ACTIVE loans

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers a penalty and how is it resolved?')
g.text: Blocks borrower until admin clears it
